zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Aston於1415年1月5日出生在英國斯塔福爾薩爾時，他的父親Robert De Aston III26歲，母親Isabel Beeston20歲。他於1436年11月5日與Isabell de Brereton在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1452年在英國斯塔福爾格亞特 海伍德被列為high sheriff。他去世於1465年6月5日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Aston于1415年1月5日出生在英国斯塔福爾薩爾时，他的父亲Robert De Aston III26岁，母亲Isabel Beeston20岁。他于1436年11月5日与Isabell de Brereton在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1452年在英国斯塔福爾格亞特 海伍德被列为high sheriff。他去世于1465年6月5日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Aston was born on 5 January 1415, in Tixall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert De Aston III, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Beeston, was 20. He married Isabell de Brereton on 5 November 1436, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. In 1452, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Great Haywood, Staffordshire, England. He died on 5 June 1465, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Aston est né le 5 janvier 1415, à Tixall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Aston III, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Beeston, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabell de Brereton le 5 novembre 1436, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. En 1452, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Great Haywood, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1465, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Aston am 5. Januar 1415 in Tixall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Aston III 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Beeston 20. Er hat am 5. November 1436 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England Isabell de Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1452, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Great Haywood, Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Juni 1465 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Aston è nato il il 5 gennaio 1415 nel Tixall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert De Aston III, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Beeston, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabell de Brereton il 5 novembre 1436, nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1452, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Great Haywood, Staffordshire, England. Morì il 5 giugno 1465, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Astonが1415年1月5日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアティクサルで生まれた時，父Robert De Aston IIIは26歳，母Isabel Beestonは20歳であった。1436年11月5日にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでIsabell de Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1452年，37歳の時，イギリススタフォードシュアイアグレアト ヘイウッドでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1465年6月5日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Aston(이)가 1415년 1월 5일 영국 스태퍼드실르 티스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Aston III(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Beeston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1436년 11월 5일 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 Isabell de Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1452년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르 그리트 헤이우드에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1465년 6월 5일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Aston nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1415, em Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Aston III, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Beeston, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell de Brereton em 5 de novembro de 1436, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1452, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Great Haywood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1465, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: астон би суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Aston родился 5 января 1415 г. в местности тиксалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Aston III было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Beeston, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell de Brereton 5 ноября 1436 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1452 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности грит хеивуд, стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер 5 июня 1465 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.5 January 1415–5 June 1465: 5 de enero de 1415–5 de junio de 1465
es.Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, Unit: Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Aston nació el 5 de enero de 1415, en Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert De Aston III, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Beeston, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabell de Brereton el 5 de noviembre de 1436, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1452, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Great Haywood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 5 de junio de 1465, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
